title: Auto-load feed + carousel memory + quick-message
notes: New: Feed auto-loads more posts as you scroll — no more tapping 'Load more posts'
New: Multi-image post carousels remember which slide you were on across tab switches
New: 💬 quick-message button next to Call on each online expert — skip the profile page
Built on top of 2026.0518.0007 — all earlier fixes (coin sync, restrict, edit post, last seen, mute icons, etc) still in this bundle
